title: Google Chrome on iOS sad tabs with the following testcase.
bounty_rationale: below baseline report of memory corruption in a sandboxed process
description_snippet:
# Steps to reproduce the problem
Put the following testcase in a file, e.g. testcase.html:

<script>
let x = new Intl.Locale("en-variant0-variant1-variant2-variant3-variant4-variant5-variant6-variant7-variant8-variant9-varianta-variantb-variantc-variantd-variante-variantf-variantg-varianth-varianti-
